case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. CRISTEN IRENE KOETSIER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOETSIER, CRISTEN IRENE $525.34 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $610.34 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KOETSIER, CRISTEN IRENE
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $525.34 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KOETSIER, CRISTEN IRENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD) AS TO DEFENDANT KOETSIER, CRISTEN IRENE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED AUG-07-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KOETSIER, CRISTEN IRENE
